text: A two-year-old girl is stealing popcorn from Prince Harry.
How long can it go on before he catches on?
One, two, three, all the way up to ten.
The video is warming hearts around the globe.
It happened at the Invictus Games being held this week in Toronto.
Emily is the daughter of a British soldier, David Henson, who lost two limbs in Afghanistan.
Prince Harry founded the competition in 2014 for wounded servicemen and women, an event Melania Trump helped kick off.
Harry clearly enjoyed goofing around with Emily.
The fifth in line to the British throne has made it known that he can't wait to become a father.
